description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a distinctive yellow body and a large, cylindrical black suppressor attached to the barrel. The main body features a boxy, utilitarian design with angular lines and a matte finish, suggesting a focus on function over aesthetics. The grip is straight and black, positioned below the main body, and the trigger is housed within a small, squared trigger guard. The top of the shotgun has a small, raised sight or rail, and the rear section is truncated, lacking a traditional stock. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer or plastic components for the grip and suppressor. The object is visually striking due to its bold color contrast and unconventional proportions, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A compact, yellow shotgun with a large black suppressor, boxy body, and straight black grip. It features a squared trigger guard and lacks a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow body, large black suppressor, straight black grip, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view dominated by the circular black suppressor, with the yellow body and small sight visible above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the same yellow body, suppressor, and grip, with minor details of the action mechanism visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the truncated back of the shotgun, yellow body, and the alignment of the grip and suppressor.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a large cylindrical suppressor; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: small, squared trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
